name: Almond-Topped Pear Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. The pears should be pared and thinly sliced. There should be about 4 1/2 cups total.
2. Combine the cornstarch, ginger, and salt in a large bowl. Add the corn syrup, melted butter, lemon juice, and lemon rind, stirring until smooth. Add the pears and toss until well coated with the corn syrup mixture.
3. Arrange the mixture into the unbaked pie shell. Prepare the Almond Topping and sprinkle over the pears.
4. Bake in a preheated 400 degree F. oven for 15 minutes. Reduce the heat to 350 degrees F. and bake an additional 30 minutes or until the topping and crust are golden brown. Cool on a wire rack.
